title: Social Media Influencer Script Generator
scenario: Generate a script for a social media influencer to promote a new product. The script must be engaging, informative, and authentic to the provided influencer persona. Use the persona's voice and style to guide the content and tone.
constraints: Must include a call-to-action within the first 2 minutes
Must use the provided influencer's preferred brand and product name

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the response adhere to the provided persona's tone, language, and style?
Does the response encourage engagement and interaction with the audience?
Does the response convey authenticity and credibility towards the product?
Is a call-to-action included within the first 2 minutes?
